summary: Completed testing of Discovery Gateway, Mode State Logic, and Venue Photo Toggle features. All 9 features verified working. Backend APIs (10/10 tests passed) and Frontend UI all functioning correctly.

discovery_gateway.result: Shows two options: 'Here & Now' and 'Not Here' with data-testid attributes

here_now_navigation.result: Navigates to /venues and sets discovery_mode to 'here_now'

not_here_navigation.result: Navigates to /discover/not-here and sets discovery_mode to 'not_here'

here_now_no_tabs.result: NO toggle tabs found - only 'Back to Discovery' button present

not_here_no_tabs.result: NO toggle tabs found - only 'Back to Discovery' button present

back_to_discovery.result: Returns to /discover/select and clears discovery_mode to null

privacy_safety_section.result: Privacy & Safety section visible with green shield icon

hide_photo_toggle.result: Toggle with data-testid='hide-photo-venues-toggle' found and functional

privacy_toggle_persistence.test: Toggled setting and verified via API
privacy_toggle_persistence.result: Backend correctly saves and returns hide_photo_in_venues value

helper_text.result: Found: 'Your photo will be replaced with a generic silhouette in venue lists...'

conditional_helper_text.test: Checked for conditional text when toggle is ON
conditional_helper_text.result: Found: 'Active when you're in Here & Now mode. Has no effect in Not Here or other views.'

critical_code_review_comments: Discovery.js correctly implements mode selection gateway at /discover/select
Here & Now mode navigates to /venues (not /discover/here) as per requirements
Not Here mode navigates to /discover/not-here correctly
Both modes have 'Back to Discovery' button with data-testid='back-to-discovery'
No toggle tabs present in either mode - correct implementation
Settings.js has Privacy & Safety section with hide_photo_in_venues toggle
Helper text explains silhouette behavior clearly
Conditional helper text appears when toggle is ON
Backend settings.py correctly handles discovery_mode and privacy settings
venues.py includes hide_photo_in_venues field in Who's Here response
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discovery Gateway, Mode State Logic, and Venue Photo Toggle features all verified working. Discovery mode endpoints: POST/GET /api/settings/discovery-mode. Privacy endpoints: GET/PUT /api/settings/privacy. Key routes: /discover/select (gateway), /discover/not-here (Not Here mode), /venues (Here & Now mode). Toggle data-testid: hide-photo-venues-toggle. All data-testid attributes present for testing.
